checklist.detail: New module prepare-for-synthesis.ts composes normalizeText → chunkText → wordCount exactly as specified; exports SynthesisChunk interface and prepareForSynthesis function; test suite covers all 6 acceptance criteria (empty/whitespace, single chunk, multi-chunk, wordCount, maxLength invariant, non-positive throw).

checklist.detail: Only two files added: the new module and its test file. No changes to any existing files, no unrelated churn.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: Genuinely imports and delegates to normalizeText, chunkText, wordCount; tests exercise real behavior with varied inputs and invariants, no weakened or removed tests, no hard-coded expected values.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: Pure composition of already-shipped utilities; no side effects, no changes to existing code, no security or regression risk.
checklist.label: Safe to advance
